description: Product description Axe Men of 6 Dark Temptation Body Spray - 150ml Directions Clean and dry the underarm area before application. Apply a thin, even layer of deodorant to the armpit area. Allow the deodorant to dry completely before putting on clothes. Reapply as needed throughout the day or after physical activity for continued protection.
